items.title: Uganda's president sworn in for record seventh term
items.dek: Yoweri Museveni, 81, won disputed elections in January to extend his 40-year rule.
items.body: Yoweri Museveni, 81, won disputed elections in January to extend his 40-year rule.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US inflation jumps to 3.8% as energy costs surge from Iran war
items.dek: The key measure of US inflation rose in April to its highest level since May 2023 as consumers feel the impact of the Iran war.
items.body: The key measure of US inflation rose in April to its highest level since May 2023 as consumers feel the impact of the Iran war.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Gun ammunition that derailed Frontier flight at DIA belonged to law enforcement, airline says
